info.title: CodeBuddy
info.description: CodeBuddy is a tool for developers to help them understand their code by generating diagrams and interacting with AI.

get.description: Check if the tools router is operational.

schema.title: Response Health Check Tools Health Get

post.description: Initiate repository processing as a background Celery task for the current user.

schema.title: Response Setup Repo Tools Setup Post

get.description: Retrieve the status of a Celery background task.

schema.title: Response Get Task Status Tools Task Status  Task Id  Get

get.description: Check if the chat router is operational.

schema.title: Response Health Check Chat Health Get

get.description: List all chats belonging to the current user.

post.description: Create a new chat session for the current user.

get.description:
Retrieve a chat session by its ID.
Only returns chat if the current user owns it.

delete.description:
Delete a chat session by its ID.
Only works if the current user owns the chat.

post.description:
Add a message to an existing chat session and get AI response.
Only works if the current user owns the chat.

schema.title: Response Health Check Diagram Health Get

post.description:
Analyze user input and recommend the most appropriate diagram type.

This endpoint uses AI to analyze the user's query and suggest one of 22 supported
diagram types (flowchart, sequence, class, etc.). The frontend can use this to
provide users with intelligent diagram type suggestions before generation.

Args:
    request: Contains user input for analysis
    current_user: Authenticated user (required for API access)
    
Returns:
    dict: Response containing the recommended diagram type

schema.title: Response Detect Diagram Type Diagram Detect Type Post

get.description: Get a diagram by its ID. Only returns if the current user owns it.

patch.description: Update an existing diagram. Only works if the current user owns it.

get.description: List all diagrams belonging to the current user.

post.description: Generate a diagram based on user input using the diagram agent.
